overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence showing a futuristic hovercraft flying through a neon-lit cyberpunk city at night. The vehicle maneuvers around a distinctive glowing pyramid structure amidst towering skyscrapers and atmospheric spotlights.

scene_state.functional_zone: aerial corridor between skyscrapers near illuminated pyramid

events.description: vehicle banks left around the pyramid structure, revealing more of the neon city skyline

agents.ego_description: piloting a futuristic hovercraft through the city airspace, banking left around the pyramid while maintaining altitude

entered.detail: large geometric pyramid with glowing green neon edges and metal truss framework
tall industrial structures emitting bright white spotlights into the stormy sky
distant skyscrapers with colorful neon signage and illuminated windows
raised roadway structure with streaks of vehicle lights

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a futuristic hovercraft flying through a stormy cyberpunk city at night. The vehicle approaches a massive glowing pyramid structure from the right while spotlights pierce the sky from distant towers. The camera follows smoothly as the craft banks left, revealing the neon-lit city skyline in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular flight path around pyramid showing urban grid below

events.description: vehicle descends slightly while circling, revealing neon-lit city streets through the pyramid's truss structure

agents.ego_description: circling around the pyramid structure, descending to reveal the urban landscape and street level below

entered.detail: geometric metal framework forming the pyramid's structure with glowing green accents
street level view of the city with illuminated roads and building lights

segments.scene_description: The hovercraft continues its circular trajectory around the pyramid, moving from the right side toward the center of the frame. As the vehicle descends slightly, the geometric trusswork of the pyramid becomes prominent in the center, while the spotlight towers and elevated highway from the previous segment rotate out of view. The neon-lit city streets become visible through the pyramid's open framework.

events.description: vehicle flies through the pyramid's internal truss structure, ascending toward the glowing apex

agents.ego_description: flying upward through the pyramid's framework, approaching the glowing green apex while the structure shifts to the left of the frame

entered.detail: the pointed top of the pyramid structure with intense green lighting

segments.scene_description: In the final segment, the hovercraft ascends through the pyramid's open truss structure, moving toward the glowing green apex. The pyramid shifts from the center to the left side of the frame as the vehicle passes it. The detailed metal framework and the bright apex dominate the view before the vehicle continues past the structure into the open city airspace.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a futuristic hovercraft maneuvers around a massive glowing pyramid within a stormy, neon-lit cyberpunk city. It begins with the vehicle approaching the structure from the right, banking left to reveal a sprawling skyline pierced by distant spotlights. As the craft continues its circular trajectory, the camera descends to bring the pyramid's intricate geometric trusswork into focus, causing the highway and towers to rotate out of view while city streets emerge through the open framework. The scene then shifts as the hovercraft ascends through the metal structure toward a glowing green apex, which slides to the left of the frame. Finally, the vehicle passes the bright peak and moves beyond the pyramid into the open airspace of the city.
